title: chromolaena arrayana
intro: Chromolaena arrayana, also known as Spanish needle, is a tropical plant native to Central and South America, characterized by its yellow flowers and small leaves. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Chromolaena arrayana include treating fever, sore throats, and respiratory issues, as well as reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of Chromolaena arrayana include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
